name: chr3q11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 3 q-arm pericentric flank (3q11.1-3q11.2), the q-side sub-centromeric LCR shoreline. Alpha-satellite (D3Z1), pericentromeric SDs and HSat3 patches. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR + HSat3 patches + Horvath/She pericentromeric SD shoreline on the q-side.
